name: A Dystopian future RPG
description:
╔═══━━━─~●~─━━━═══╗

Read before continuing!!

"Welcome to Latania! The perfect utopian city! Where we break all ends!"

Is what the city government says to everyone, but in reality it's more of a perfect distopian future than a utopian one.

This city while looking like a perfect utopian city from afar is actually filled with corruption and crime. In here, if you have the money, or is willing to sell your body, you can get away with anything and everything. Those without money or those who are not willing to become a prostitute, struggle immensely.

This city is divided into four sectors, namely the bronze sector, SILVER SECTOR, GOLD SECTOR and finally the DIAMOND SECTOR.

All of these sectors are divided by heights. Lower most, the one that starts off from the floor is the BRONZE SECTOR. The one above it is the SILVER SECTOR, Above it GOLD and then finally the top most, the DIAMOND SECTOR.

The city's government taxes the people in the bronze and silver sector a lot and use that money on the gold and diamond sector.

╚═══━━━─~●~─━━━═══╝

╔═══━━━─~●~─━━━═══╗

THE BRONZE SECTOR!

This is like the underworld. One can clearly see the switch difference of silver sector and the bronze sector. This sector starts off from the floor of the city, and is in the lowest place possible, and hence gets almost no sunlight. This sector is the embodiment of corruption, sex and money rules this sector, illegal bar, clubs, brothels are littered like dirt on the floor, neon signs, the exact picture of A dystopian future city. Dark, moist and almost always wet. This is the place where one could get almost anything he would ever want, illegal weapons? Yup! Prostitutes? Absolutely! And if you don't want a living body to fuck how about just a torso? You got it! Gags rules this sector. Prostitutes casually walks around wearing tiny holograms that cover only the essentials or similar cloths. Some People here miss an limb or two or an eye, but they make up for it by robotic arms and eyes. The buildings here are usually made up of old rusted iron, or old cracked concrete bricks. People here are extreamly hostile to outsiders, the lack of sunlight has made their mind go crazy, almost all of them are drunk or 99.9% of them are drunk. If one accidentally bumps into some one from here, you bet there is going to be a fight where only one would walk out alive.

╚═══━━━─~●~─━━━═══╝

╔═══━━━─~●~─━━━═══╗

THE SILVER SECTOR!
creator: Noobiimaster69
